name: Morning FP Foundation
description: A beginner-friendly group class focusing on the fundamentals of Functional Patterns. Perfect for those new to FP or wanting to reinforce the basics alongside other students.

name: Advanced Movement Integration
description: For experienced FP clients who have completed at least 6 individual sessions. Focuses on integrating corrective patterns into complex multi-joint movements.

name: Online Gait Workshop
description: Monthly online workshop where we analyze and correct gait patterns as a group. Bring your phone to record your walking pattern before class.
